name: test_proxy
description:
arrange: given a model configured with squid proxy ip address.
    act: when tmate charm is deployed.
    assert: proxy log contains docker access.
descriptionHtml:
arrange: given a model configured with squid proxy ip address.
act: when tmate charm is deployed.
assert: proxy log contains docker access.
